Some preamble text from the discussant reviewing the brief.

The UX researcher identifies two main friction points worth validating
and one concern about decision fatigue.

## DISCUSSION COMPLETE

### Questions

- Q: How does a first-time user recover from the onboarding skip?
  Concern: activation journey
  Severity: blocker
  Rationale: Skipping leaves state uninitialized; return visits hit a blank screen.
- Q: What happens on the empty-state of the library view?
  Concern: engagement
  Severity: major
  Rationale: Empty state drives ~30% of D1 churn per prior research.

### Concerns

- C: Decision fatigue on the preferences screen.
  Area: journey
  Severity: minor
  Rationale: Seven decisions with no recommended default increases friction.
